summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite, alongside embedded firmware for input devices, a Windows driver, and multiple AI/ML research projects. Also maintained Android apps, automation tooling, and developer utilities.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built and tested a kernel-mode input filtering and injection driver for Windows.

items.title: Android TTS engine
items.description: Developed a text-to-speech engine for Android with multiple voice models and accent support.

items.title: E-ink device firmware
items.description: Expanded custom firmware for an e-ink device with a knowledge base app and e-book reader.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Iterated on a .NET rewrite of a crypto algo-trading platform, adding proxy infrastructure, strategy templates, and a new billing model.

items.title: ESP32-S3 input emulation firmware
items.description: Developed a new firmware variant for mouse and keyboard emulation on ESP32-S3 hardware.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, including CI/CD and store publishing workflows.

items.title: Computer vision utility project
items.description: Worked on a personal C++ project involving screen capture, overlays, and input device emulation.

items.title: E-ink reader custom firmware
items.description: Enhanced custom firmware for an e-ink device with a map application and knowledge base.

items.title: Proxy client application
items.description: Maintained a proxy client app, updating the core and adding transport support.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted machine learning experiments on mixture-of-experts architectures for crypto price prediction.

items.title: Android LLM assistant
items.description: Built an on-device LLM assistant for Android with tool-use and sub-agent delegation capabilities.

items.title: Backend for mobile assistant
items.description: Set up the backend API infrastructure for a mobile AI assistant application.

items.title: E-ink Android launcher
items.description: Developed a note-taking focused launcher for Android e-ink devices.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Built a graph-powered code analysis tool with LSP integration and multi-language support.

items.title: Neovim configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE setup and configuration.

items.title: n8n automation nodes
items.description: Maintained a fork of Telegram automation nodes for n8n workflow engine.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Created a minimalistic browser-based labeling tool for YOLO object detection datasets.

items.title: Dotfiles management
items.description: Set up and managed personal dotfiles configuration.

items.title: Online poker computer vision
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games and reconstructing hand histories.

items.title: Claude Code automation node
items.description: Updated an n8n node for integrating with Claude Code agent SDK.

items.title: Task management app
items.description: Started a personal task management application for Android.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Built an autonomous multi-session AI coding assistant with worktree management and git integration.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized numerous algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Telegram trading bot infrastructure
items.description: Built a Telegram bot and web application for monitoring and managing crypto trading bots.

items.title: Flutter trading monitor
items.description: Created a mobile monitoring dashboard for crypto trading bots with charts and performance metrics.

items.title: Telegram automation tools
items.description: Worked on Telegram-based automation and content aggregation tools.

items.title: Content collection service
items.description: Built a content aggregation service with webhook integration and filtering capabilities.

items.title: Crypto trading strategies
items.description: Developed and optimized algorithmic trading strategies for cryptocurrency markets.

items.title: Crypto signaler bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for generating and sharing crypto trading signals with AI integration.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Maintained a .NET-based Telegram bot for interacting with ChatGPT.

items.title: C++ server project
items.description: Started a personal C++ server project.
